testcase.name: <golden:validator_coverage_expansion>
testcase.failure: Line 1: US_MILITARY_ADDRESS detected with 95.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: PSC 1523, Box 25, APO AE 09009 Validator: physical_address Line 3: US_STREET_ADDRESS detected with 95.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 123 O'Brien St Validator: physical_address Line 2: US_RURAL_ROUTE detected with 90.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: Rural Route 3 Box 88 Validator: physical_address Line 4: US_STREET_ADDRESS detected with 90.0% confidence (HIGH) Match: 456 King-Smith Rd Validator: physical_address Line 5: DRIVERS_LICENSE detected with 85.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: D12345678901234 Validator: driverslicense Line 7: OTP_SECRET detected with 85.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: jbswy3dpehpk3pxp Validator: otp Line 6: DRIVERS_LICENSE detected with 70.0% confidence (MEDIUM) Match: J1234567890123 Validator: driverslicense Line 8: US_RURAL_ROUTE detected with 40.0% confidence (LOW) Match: RR 4 Validator: physical_address
